You might know CIDR subnets better by their textual representation where they consist of an ip address followed by a slash and a prefix number, for example 192.168.99.0/24.
你可能更熟悉 CIDR 子网的文本表示形式——它由一个 IP 地址后跟斜杠和前缀长度组成，例如 192.168.99.0/24。
One of the purposes contained in the extended key usage extension
扩展密钥用途扩展中包含的用途之一，详见 RFC 5280 第 4.2.1.12 节
This type has similarities to the SanType enum but is not equal. For example, GeneralSubtree has CIDR subnets for ip addresses while SanType has IP addresses.
此类型与 SanType 枚举类似但并不相同。例如，GeneralSubtree 对 IP 地址使用 CIDR 子网，而 SanType 使用 IP 地址。

Key identifiers should be derived from the public key data. RFC 7093 defines three methods to do so using a choice of SHA256 (method 1), SHA384 (method 2), or SHA512 (method 3). In each case the first 160 bits of the hash are used as the key identifier to match the output length that would be produced were SHA1 used (a legacy option defined in RFC 5280).
密钥标识符应从公钥数据派生。RFC 7093 定义了三种派生方法：SHA256（方法 1）、SHA384（方法 2）或 SHA512（方法 3）。在每种情况下，使用哈希的前 160 位作为密钥标识符，以匹配若使用 SHA1（RFC 5280 中定义的遗留选项）所产生的输出长度。
In addition to the RFC 7093 mechanisms, rcgen supports using a pre-specified key identifier. This can be helpful when working with an existing Certificate.
除 RFC 7093 机制外，rcgen 还支持使用预指定的密钥标识符。这在与现有 Certificate 协作时很有用。
One of the purposes contained in the key usage extension
密钥用途扩展中包含的用途之一，详见 RFC 5280 第 4.2.1.3 节
An OtherName value, defined in RFC 5280§4.1.2.4.
OtherName 值，定义见 RFC 5280 §4.1.2.4。
Identifies the reason a certificate was revoked. See RFC 5280 §5.3.1
标识证书被吊销的原因。参见 RFC 5280 §5.3.1
Helper to obtain an OffsetDateTime from year, month, day values
从年、月、日取值获取 OffsetDateTime 的辅助函数

The most simple way of using this crate is by calling the generate_simple_self_signed function. For more customization abilities, construct a CertificateParams and a key pair to call CertificateParams::signed_by or CertificateParams::self_signed. It is also possible to write a certificate to disk with date_time_ymd helper.
使用本 crate 最简单的方式是调用 generate_simple_self_signed 函数。若需要更灵活的定制，可构造 CertificateParams 和一个密钥对来调用 CertificateParams::signed_by 或 CertificateParams::self_signed。也可以使用 date_time_ymd 辅助函数将证书写入磁盘。
ECDSA signing using the P-256 curves and SHA-256 hashing as per RFC 5758
按 RFC 5758 第 3.2 节 使用 P-256 曲线与 SHA-256 哈希的 ECDSA 签名
ECDSA signing using the P-384 curves and SHA-384 hashing as per RFC 5758
按 RFC 5758 第 3.2 节 使用 P-384 曲线与 SHA-384 哈希的 ECDSA 签名
ED25519 curve signing as per RFC 8410
按 RFC 8410 进行的 ED25519 曲线签名
RSA signing with PKCS#1 1.5 padding and SHA-256 hashing as per RFC 4055
按 RFC 4055 使用 PKCS#1 1.5 填充与 SHA-256 哈希的 RSA 签名
RSA signing with PKCS#1 1.5 padding and SHA-384 hashing as per RFC 4055
按 RFC 4055 使用 PKCS#1 1.5 填充与 SHA-384 哈希的 RSA 签名
RSA signing with PKCS#1 1.5 padding and SHA-512 hashing as per RFC 4055
按 RFC 4055 使用 PKCS#1 1.5 填充与 SHA-512 哈希的 RSA 签名
A PKCS #10 CSR attribute, as defined in RFC 5280 and constrained by RFC 2986.
由 RFC 5280 附录 A.1 定义、并受 RFC 2986 第 4 节 约束的 PKCS #10 CSR 属性。
CertificateDer implements Deref<Target = [u8]> and AsRef<[u8]>, so you can easily extract the DER bytes from the return value.
CertificateDer 实现了 Deref<Target = [u8]> 与 AsRef<[u8]>，因此你可以轻松地从返回值中提取 DER 字节。
CertificateRevocationListDer implements Deref<Target = [u8]> and AsRef<[u8]>, so you can easily extract the DER bytes from the return value.
CertificateRevocationListDer 实现了 Deref<Target = [u8]> 与 AsRef<[u8]>，因此你可以轻松地从返回值中提取 DER 字节。
CertificateSigningRequestDer implements Deref<Target = [u8]> and AsRef<[u8]>, so you can easily extract the DER bytes from the return value.
CertificateSigningRequestDer 实现了 Deref<Target = [u8]> 与 AsRef<[u8]>，因此你可以轻松地从返回值中提取 DER 字节。

The returned certificate will have its issuer field set to the subject of the provided issuer, and the authority key identifier extension will be populated using the subject public key of issuer (typically either a CertificateParams or Certificate). It will be signed by issuer_key.
返回的证书将其 issuer 字段设置为所提供的 issuer 的 subject，并使用 issuer 的主体公钥（通常为 CertificateParams 或 Certificate）填充 authority key identifier 扩展。它将由 issuer_key 签名。
Note that no validation of the issuer certificate is performed. Rcgen will not require the certificate to be a CA certificate, or have key usage extensions that allow signing.
注意，不会对 issuer 证书进行任何验证。Rcgen 不要求该证书是 CA 证书，也不要求其具有允许签名的密钥用途扩展。

The returned certificate will have its issuer field set to the subject of the provided issuer, and the authority key identifier extension will be populated using the subject public key of issuer. It will be signed by issuer_key.
返回的证书将其 issuer 字段设置为所提供的 issuer 的 subject，并使用 issuer 的主体公钥填充 authority key identifier 扩展。它将由 issuer_key 签名。
Note that no validation of the issuer certificate is performed. Rcgen will not require the certificate to be a CA certificate, or have key usage extensions that allow signing.
注意，不会对 issuer 证书进行任何验证。Rcgen 不要求该证书是 CA 证书，也不要求其具有允许签名的密钥用途扩展。
A certificate revocation list (CRL) distribution point, to be included in a certificate’s distribution points extension or a CRL’s issuing distribution point extension
证书吊销列表（CRL）分发点，应包含在证书的 distribution points extension 或 CRL 的 issuing distribution point extension 中
A certificate revocation list (CRL) issuing distribution point, to be included in a CRL’s issuing distribution point extension.
证书吊销列表（CRL）issuing distribution point，应包含在 CRL 的 issuing distribution point extension 中。
A custom extension of a certificate, as specified in RFC 5280
证书的自定义扩展，详见 RFC 5280 第 4.2 节
Creates a new acmeIdentifier extension for ACME TLS-ALPN-01 as specified in RFC 8737
按 RFC 8737 第 3 节 创建用于 ACME TLS-ALPN-01 的 acmeIdentifier 扩展
See also the RFC 5280 sections on the issuer and subject fields.
另请参见 RFC 5280 中关于 issuer 与 subject 字段的章节。
Use Issuer::new instead if you want to obtain an Issuer that owns its parameters.
若你希望获得一个拥有其参数的 Issuer，请改用 Issuer::new。
Generate a new random PKCS_ECDSA_P256_SHA256 key pair
生成新的随机 PKCS_ECDSA_P256_SHA256 密钥对

If you’re not sure which algorithm to use, PKCS_ECDSA_P256_SHA256 is a good choice. If passed an RSA signature algorithm, it depends on the backend whether we return a generated key or an error for key generation being unavailable. Currently, only aws-lc-rs supports RSA key generation.
如果你不确定使用哪种算法，PKCS_ECDSA_P256_SHA256 是一个不错的选择。若传入 RSA 签名算法，则根据后端的不同，可能返回生成的密钥，或返回密钥生成不可用的错误。目前，只有 aws-lc-rs 支持 RSA 密钥生成。

If aws_lc_rs feature is used, then the key must be a DER-encoded plaintext private key; as specified in PKCS #8/RFC 5958, SEC1/RFC 5915, or PKCS#1/RFC 3447; Appears as “PRIVATE KEY”, “RSA PRIVATE KEY”, or “EC PRIVATE KEY” in PEM files.
若使用 aws_lc_rs feature，则密钥必须是按 PKCS #8/RFC 5958、SEC1/RFC 5915 或 PKCS#1/RFC 3447 规定的 DER 编码明文私钥；在 PEM 文件中显示为“PRIVATE KEY”、“RSA PRIVATE KEY”或“EC PRIVATE KEY”。
Otherwise if the ring feature is used, then the key must be a DER-encoded plaintext private key; as specified in PKCS #8/RFC 5958; Appears as “PRIVATE KEY” in PEM files.
否则，若使用 ring feature，则密钥必须是按 PKCS #8/RFC 5958 规定的 DER 编码明文私钥；在 PEM 文件中显示为“PRIVATE KEY”。
Obtains the key pair from a DER formatted key using the specified SignatureAlgorithm
使用指定的 SignatureAlgorithm 从 DER 格式的密钥获取密钥对
The key must be a DER-encoded plaintext private key; as specified in PKCS #8/RFC 5958;
密钥必须是按 PKCS #8/RFC 5958 规定的 DER 编码明文私钥；
Appears as “PRIVATE KEY” in PEM files Same as from_pkcs8_pem_and_sign_algo.
在 PEM 文件中显示为“PRIVATE KEY”。与 from_pkcs8_pem_and_sign_algo 相同。
Obtains the key pair from a DER formatted key using the specified SignatureAlgorithm
使用指定的 SignatureAlgorithm 从 DER 格式的密钥获取密钥对

If you have a PrivatePkcs8KeyDer, you can usually rely on the TryFrom implementation to obtain a KeyPair – it will determine the correct SignatureAlgorithm for you. However, sometimes multiple signature algorithms are valid for the same input, in which case you’ll need to call from_pkcs8_der_and_sign_algo directly.
如果你有 PrivatePkcs8KeyDer，通常可依赖 TryFrom 实现来获取 KeyPair —— 它会为你确定正确的 SignatureAlgorithm。但有时同一输入可能对应多个有效的签名算法，此时你需要直接调用 from_pkcs8_der_and_sign_algo。

rustls_pemfile::private_key() is often used to obtain a PrivateKeyDer from PEM input. If the obtained PrivateKeyDer is a Pkcs8 variant, you can use its contents as input for this function. Alternatively, the entire PrivateKeyDer can be passed to from_private_key_der directly when using the aws_lc_rs feature.
rustls_pemfile::private_key() 常用于从 PEM 输入获取 PrivateKeyDer。若获得的 PrivateKeyDer 是 Pkcs8 变体，你可以将其内容用作此函数的输入。或者在使用 aws_lc_rs feature 时，可以直接将整个 PrivateKeyDer 传递给 from_private_key_der。
Obtains the key pair from a PEM formatted key using the specified SignatureAlgorithm
使用指定的 SignatureAlgorithm 从 PEM 格式的密钥获取密钥对
Same as from_pem_and_sign_algo.
与 from_pem_and_sign_algo 相同。
Note that using the ring feature, this function only support PrivateKeyDer::Pkcs8 variant. Consider using the aws_lc_rs features to support PrivateKeyDer fully.
注意，使用 ring feature 时，此函数仅支持 PrivateKeyDer::Pkcs8 变体。如需完整支持 PrivateKeyDer，请考虑使用 aws_lc_rs feature。

If you have a PrivateKeyDer, you can usually rely on the TryFrom implementation to obtain a KeyPair – it will determine the correct SignatureAlgorithm for you. However, sometimes multiple signature algorithms are valid for the same input, in which case you’ll need to call from_private_key_der_and_sign_algo directly.
如果你有 PrivateKeyDer，通常可依赖 TryFrom 实现来获取 KeyPair —— 它会为你确定正确的 SignatureAlgorithm。但有时同一输入可能对应多个有效的签名算法，此时你需要直接调用 from_private_key_der_and_sign_algo。
You can use rustls_pemfile::private_key to get the key input. If you have already a byte slice, just calling try_into() will convert it to a PrivateKeyDer.
你可以使用 rustls_pemfile::private_key 来获取 key 输入。如果你已经有字节切片，直接调用 try_into() 即可将其转换为 PrivateKeyDer。
The key is in raw format, as how KeyPair::public_key() would output, and how UnparsedPublicKey::verify() would accept.
密钥为原始格式，与 KeyPair::public_key() 的输出格式一致，也是 UnparsedPublicKey::verify() 所接受的格式。
Returns (possibly multiple) compatible SignatureAlgorithm’s that the key can be used with
返回（可能多个）与该密钥兼容的 SignatureAlgorithm
The NameConstraints extension (only relevant for CA certificates)
NameConstraints 扩展（仅与 CA 证书相关）
The key is formatted according to the X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo struct. See RFC 5280 section 4.1.
密钥按 X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo 结构进行格式化。参见 RFC 5280 第 4.1 节。
ASN.1 BMPString type.
ASN.1 BMPString 类型。
You can create a BmpString from a literal string with BmpString::try_from:
你可以使用 BmpString::try_from 从 字面量字符串 创建 BmpString：
BMPString is included for backward compatibility, RFC 5280 say it SHOULD NOT be used for certificates for new subjects.
包含 BMPString 是为了向后兼容；RFC 5280 规定它不应被用于新证书的主体。
The inverse of this method is from_utf16be.
该方法的逆操作是 from_utf16be。
Converts a &str to a BmpString.
将 &str 转换为 BmpString。
Any character not in the BmpString charset will be rejected. See BmpString documentation for more information.
任何不属于 BmpString 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 BmpString 文档。
Parsing a BmpString allocates memory since the UTF-8 to UTF-16 conversion requires a memory allocation.
解析 BmpString 会分配内存，因为 UTF-8 到 UTF-16 的转换需要一次内存分配。
You can create a Ia5String from a literal string with Ia5String::try_from:
你可以使用 Ia5String::try_from 从 字面量字符串 创建 Ia5String：

Supports the International Alphabet No. 5 (IA5) character encoding, i.e. the 128 characters of the ASCII alphabet. (Note: IA5 is now technically known as the International Reference Alphabet or IRA as specified in the ITU-T’s T.50 recommendation).
支持 国际字母表第 5 号（IA5） 字符编码，即 ASCII 字母表的 128 个字符。（注：IA5 在技术上现在称为国际参考字母表（IRA），见 ITU-T 的 T.50 建议书。）
Extracts a string slice containing the entire Ia5String.
提取包含整个 Ia5String 的字符串切片。
Converts a &str to a Ia5String.
将 &str 转换为 Ia5String。
Any character not in the Ia5String charset will be rejected. See Ia5String documentation for more information.
任何不属于 Ia5String 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 Ia5String 文档。
ASN.1 PrintableString type.
ASN.1 PrintableString 类型。
For the full ASCII character set, use Ia5String.
对于完整的 ASCII 字符集，请使用 Ia5String。
You can create a PrintableString from a literal string with PrintableString::try_from:
你可以使用 PrintableString::try_from 从 字面量字符串 创建 PrintableString：
PrintableString is a subset of the ASCII printable characters. For instance, '@' is a printable character as per ASCII but can’t be part of ASN.1’s PrintableString.
PrintableString 是 ASCII 可打印字符的子集。例如，'@' 按 ASCII 是可打印字符，但不能作为 ASN.1 的 PrintableString 的一部分。
Extracts a string slice containing the entire PrintableString.
提取包含整个 PrintableString 的字符串切片。
Converts a &str to a PrintableString.
将 &str 转换为 PrintableString。
Any character not in the PrintableString charset will be rejected. See PrintableString documentation for more information.
任何不属于 PrintableString 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 PrintableString 文档。
ASN.1 TeletexString type.
ASN.1 TeletexString 类型。
You can create a TeletexString from a literal string with TeletexString::try_from:
你可以使用 TeletexString::try_from 从 字面量字符串 创建 TeletexString：

The standard defines a complex character set allowed in this type. However, quoting the ASN.1 mailing list, “a sizable volume of software in the world treats TeletexString (T61String) as a simple 8-bit string with mostly Windows Latin 1 (superset of iso-8859-1) encoding”.
标准为该类型定义了复杂的字符集。然而，引用 ASN.1 邮件列表的说法：“世界上有相当数量的软件将 TeletexString（T61String）视为简单的 8 位字符串，主要采用 Windows Latin 1（iso-8859-1 的超集）编码”。
TeletexString is included for backward compatibility, RFC 5280 say it SHOULD NOT be used for certificates for new subjects.
包含 TeletexString 是为了向后兼容；RFC 5280 规定它不应被用于新证书的主体。
Extracts a string slice containing the entire TeletexString.
提取包含整个 TeletexString 的字符串切片。
Converts a &str to a TeletexString.
将 &str 转换为 TeletexString。
Any character not in the TeletexString charset will be rejected. See TeletexString documentation for more information.
任何不属于 TeletexString 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 TeletexString 文档。
ASN.1 UniversalString type.
ASN.1 UniversalString 类型。
You can create a UniversalString from a literal string with UniversalString::try_from:
你可以使用 UniversalString::try_from 从 字面量字符串 创建 UniversalString：
The characters which can appear in the UniversalString type are any of the characters allowed by ISO/IEC 10646 (Unicode).
UniversalString 类型可出现的字符是 ISO/IEC 10646（Unicode）所允许的任何字符。
UniversalString is included for backward compatibility, RFC 5280 say it SHOULD NOT be used for certificates for new subjects.
包含 UniversalString 是为了向后兼容；RFC 5280 规定它不应被用于新证书的主体。
The inverse of this method is from_utf32be.
该方法的逆操作是 from_utf32be。
Converts a &str to a UniversalString.
将 &str 转换为 UniversalString。
Any character not in the UniversalString charset will be rejected. See UniversalString documentation for more information.
任何不属于 UniversalString 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 UniversalString 文档。
Parsing a UniversalString allocates memory since the UTF-8 to UTF-32 conversion requires a memory allocation.
解析 UniversalString 会分配内存，因为 UTF-8 到 UTF-32 的转换需要一次内存分配。

If you have a PrivateKeyDer, you can usually rely on the TryFrom implementation to obtain a KeyPair – it will determine the correct SignatureAlgorithm for you. However, sometimes multiple signature algorithms fit for the same DER key. In those instances, you can use this function to precisely specify the SignatureAlgorithm.
如果你有 PrivateKeyDer，通常可依赖 TryFrom 实现来获取 KeyPair —— 它会为你确定正确的 SignatureAlgorithm。但有时同一 DER 密钥可能对应多个签名算法，此时你可以使用此函数精确指定 SignatureAlgorithm。
